allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; f=open\('Assets/_Project/Input/InputSystem_Actions.inputactions','r'\); data=json.load\(f\); f.close\(\); maps=[m['name'] for m in data['maps']]; print\('Maps:', maps\); [print\(f'  {m[\\"name\\"]}: {[a[\\"name\\"] for a in m[\\"actions\\"]]}'\) for m in data['maps']]; print\('Control schemes:', [s['name'] for s in data.get\('controlSchemes',[]\)]\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./Assets/_Project/Input/InputSystem_Actions.inputactions'\); console.log\('Maps:', d.maps.map\(m=>m.name\)\); d.maps.forEach\(m=>console.log\('  '+m.name+':', m.actions.map\(a=>a.name\)\)\); console.log\('Schemes:', \(d.controlSchemes||[]\).map\(s=>s.name\)\)")
